_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Department OF Defense (Dod) Handbook Documents
summary: This DID specifies content and format for DoD Handbooks, providing guidance, engineering information, and lessons learned to help government and contractors in system design and operation.
use_relationship: A DoD Handbook will be used as a guidance document that enhances user awareness by providing engineering information; lessons learned; possible options to address technical issues; classification of similar items, materials, or processes; interpretative direction and techniques; and any other type of guidance information that may help the Government or its contractors in the design, construction, selection, management, support, or operation of systems, products, processes or services. This Data Item Description contains the content and format preparation instructions for DoD handbooks and their associated documents that are described in the following paragraphs of MIL-STD-967. Only those documents listed below will be required when specified individually on contract. a. DoD Handbook – Paragraphs 4.1 through 5.12. b. DoD Handbook Revision – Paragraph 5.13. c. DoD Handbook Change – Paragraph 5.14 through 5.14.8. d. DoD Handbook Inactive for New Design Notice – Paragraph 5.15.2. e. DoD Handbook Cancellation Notice – Paragraph 5.15.3. f. DoD Handbook Reinstatement Notice – Paragraph 5.15.4. g. DoD Handbook Reactivation Notice – Paragraph 5.15.5. h. DoD Handbook Administrative Notice – Paragraph 5.15.6.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their dates and dates of any applicable notices and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format and content for DoD Handbooks shall be as follows:

children.title: DoD Handbooks.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Handbooks shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-967, paragraphs 4.1 through 5.12.

children.title: DoD Handbook Revisions.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Handbook Revisions shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-967, paragraph 5.13.

children.title: DoD Handbook Changes.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Handbook Changes shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-967, paragraphs 5.14 through 5.14.8.

children.title: DoD Handbook Inactive for New Design Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Handbook Inactive for New Design Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-967, paragraph 5.15.2.

children.title: DoD Handbook Cancellation Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Handbook Cancellation Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-967, paragraph 5.15.3.

children.title: DoD Handbook Reinstatement Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Handbook Reinstatement Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-967, paragraph 5.15.4.

children.title: DoD Handbook Reactivation Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Handbook Reactivation Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-967, paragraph 5.15.5.

children.title: DoD Handbook Administrative Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Handbook Administrative Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-967, paragraph 5.15.6.
